name: Amway Corp.
lede: Amway runs two capability centers across two Indian cities. Gurugram and Nilakkottai, covering gbs and manufacturing, built over eight years.
insight: Search elsewhere and you will usually find one Amway office in India. We map two, across two cities, each tagged by center type and function. Knowing the whole footprint is what turns a name on a list into an account you can plan against.
metaTitle: Amway Corp. GCC in India: Centers, Footprint & Leaders | Bamboo Reports
metaDescription: Amway runs 2 verified GCC centers across 2 Indian cities (Gurugram, Nilakkottai), covering gbs and manufacturing. See the full India footprint, org map and contacts on Bamboo Reports.

leaders.departments: Finance, IT, HR, GCC leadership and Procurement

titles.title: Enterprise CIO | Digital Transformation & Governance Leader | $2.0 M+ IT Portfolio Leadership | ECommerce, Cloud & Enterprise Modernization | Board-Level Strategy | Open to India & GCC
HR Manager for Technology Centre and Head Office at Amway

about.description: Amway's India footprint covers Gurugram and Nilakkottai, spanning gbs and manufacturing. The centers deliver IT, R&D and ER&D, Finance & Accounting and HR for the group's global operations.

bandCopy: Exact center locations, per-center headcount, the technology stack and all 29 decision-makers, in one profile.

faq.q: How many GCC centers does Amway operate in India?
faq.a: Amway operates 2 active Global Capability Center sites in India.

faq.q: Which Indian cities does Amway have GCC centers in?
faq.a: Amway's India GCC footprint spans Gurugram and Nilakkottai.

faq.q: What types of GCC centers does Amway run in India?
faq.a: Amway runs gbs and manufacturing centers in India.

faq.q: How many people work at Amway's India GCCs?
faq.a: Amway's India centers employ in the 1,000 to 5,000 range. The exact aggregate and the headcount at each site are in the full profile.

faq.q: Who leads Amway's GCC in India?
faq.a: Bamboo Reports tracks 29 leaders at Amway's India centers, across Finance, IT, HR, GCC leadership and Procurement. Names and contact details open with a free account.

sources: company filings, LinkedIn, NASSCOM and Bamboo Reports' primary research
